name: ghostchat
description: Anonymous ephemeral E2EE chat — web, CLI, Cloudflare Workers

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @ghostchat/shared build && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/protocol build && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/crypto build
scripts.test: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/shared test && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/crypto test && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/worker test
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/web/.next node_modules/.cache packages/*/dist packages/*/dist-test && pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist .next dist-test 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.audit:local: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @ghostchat/web build
